testcase.failure:
capsys = <_pytest.capture.CaptureFixture object at 0x104ccfe00> samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. Spring 2026/CS-UH 3260 004 Software Analytics/Assignments/Replication 2/Replication_MigrateLib/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomli/samples') x11_tmp_dir = PosixPath('/private/var/folders/h0/jlvd527n7kv9n50q8557my5c0000gn/T/pytest-of-namugo/pytest-7/x11_tmp2') hotspot = (100, 105)
def test_clickgen_raises(capsys, samples_dir, x11_tmp_dir, hotspot): fp = samples_dir / "sample.toml" with open(fp, "rb") as f: with mock.patch( "argparse.ArgumentParser.parse_args", return_value=argparse.Namespace( files=[f], output=x11_tmp_dir, hotspot_x=hotspot[0], hotspot_y=hotspot[1], sizes=SIZES, delay=DELAY, platform="all", ), ): main() captured = capsys.readouterr() > assert "Error occurred while processing sample.toml" in captured.err E assert 'Error occurred while processing sample.toml' in 'Error occurred while processing CS:
Traceback (most recent call last):
 File "/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. Spring 2026/CS-UH 3260 004 Software Analytics/Assignments/Replication 2/Replication_MigrateLib/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomli/src/clickgen/scripts/clickgen.py", line 93, in main

testcase.name: test_parse_toml_file

failure.message: TypeError: bytes object expected; got str

testcase.failure:
samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. Spring 2026/CS-UH 3260 004 Software Analytics/Assignments/Replication 2/Replication_MigrateLib/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomli/samples')
def test_parse_toml_file(samples_dir: Path): fp = samples_dir / "sample.toml" > c: ClickgenConfig = parse_toml_file(fp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_configparser.py:163: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/clickgen/configparser.py:151: in parse_toml_file d: Dict[str, Any] = tomli.load(file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
> ??? E TypeError: bytes object expected; got str
src/tomli/_parser.py:139: TypeError

testcase.name: test_parse_config_files

failure.message: TypeError: bytes object expected; got str

testcase.failure:
samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. Spring 2026/CS-UH 3260 004 Software Analytics/Assignments/Replication 2/Replication_MigrateLib/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomli/samples')
def test_parse_config_files(samples_dir: Path): for ext in ["json", "yaml", "toml"]: fp = samples_dir / f"sample.{ext}" > c: ClickgenConfig = parse_config_file(fp) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_configparser.py:182: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/clickgen/configparser.py:196: in parse_config_file config = parse_toml_file(fp, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/clickgen/configparser.py:151: in parse_toml_file d: Dict[str, Any] = tomli.load(file) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
> ??? E TypeError: bytes object expected; got str
src/tomli/_parser.py:139: TypeError
